description.task: Implement a PomDependencyParser class that parses a simplified POM-like structure (represented as a list of strings in 'groupId:artifactId:version:scope' format) and provides query methods to filter by scope and detect duplicate groupId:artifactId pairs.
instructions: addDependency() splits the input string on ':' into exactly 4 parts
getByScope() filters dependencies list by matching scope field (case-sensitive)
findDuplicates() returns a list of 'groupId:artifactId' strings that appear more than once across all added dependencies
The returned duplicates list should not itself contain duplicates
addDependency() should handle malformed strings gracefully (skip them)
description.hint: For findDuplicates(), use a Map<String, Long> with stream groupingBy and counting, then filter entries where count > 1.

description.task: Create a MavenBuildRunner class that models Maven's default build phases (validate, compile, test, package, verify, install, deploy) with configurable plugin goals attached to specific phases. When a phase runs, all goals bound to that phase should execute in order.
instructions: bindGoal() appends the goal to the list for the given phase (creating the list if absent)
execute() runs phases from 'validate' through targetPhase in LIFECYCLE order
For each phase, executionLog should record '[phase] Running: [goal]' for each bound goal
Phases with no bound goals are silently skipped (nothing logged)
If targetPhase is invalid (not in LIFECYCLE), return an empty list
description.hint: Use phaseGoals.getOrDefault(phase, List.of()) to safely get goals. Format the log entry as phase + " Running: " + goal.
description.expectedOutput:
compile Running: compiler:compile
test Running: surefire:test
package Running: jar:jar

description.task: Implement a DependencyScopeResolver that determines the effective classpath for different Maven scopes. Given a list of dependencies (each with a scope), return only those that should appear on the compile, test, or runtime classpath respectively.
instructions: compileClasspath() includes COMPILE and PROVIDED scopes
testClasspath() includes COMPILE, TEST, RUNTIME, and PROVIDED scopes
runtimeClasspath() includes COMPILE and RUNTIME scopes (not PROVIDED — container provides it at runtime)
Each method returns the dep names (not Dep objects) as a list
Maintain the original order from the input list
description.hint: Use stream filter with Set.of(Scope.COMPILE, Scope.PROVIDED) for compile classpath. Use EnumSet for efficient scope membership checks.
description.expectedOutput:
Compile: [spring-core, servlet-api]
Test: [spring-core, junit, logback, servlet-api]
Runtime: [spring-core, logback]
